facebook.caption: If snorkeling or scuba diving is on your Phu Quoc bucket list, Phu Quoc Local Guide at 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực is a name worth bookmarking. Rated an impressive 4.9 out of 5 across 66 reviews, this spot clearly earns the trust of travelers who want to explore the island's underwater world with local expertise. Whether you're a first-time snorkeler or a certified diver, going with knowledgeable local guides makes a real difference in the quality and safety of your experience. Practical tip: book in advance, especially during peak season from November to April when visibility is at its best and spots fill up fast.

instagram.caption: Crystal waters, colorful coral, and local guides who actually know these reefs. Phu Quoc Local Guide at 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực holds a 4.9/5 rating for good reason. Book ahead during dry season (Nov to Apr) for the best underwater visibility in Phu Quoc.
